title: mumei project configuration
description: Contents of .mumei/config.json: project-wide mumei settings, vehicle/feature independent. Read by hooks/_lib/config.sh. Validation only — not consumed by the dashboard.

golden_paths.description: Path globs treated as immutable specification / oracle files. Backs G1 (Edit/Write deny) and G2 (Bash-tamper deny); the clean-HEAD worktree measurement runs tests against golden's committed content. Single-level bash case globs only (* ? [...]); ** is not expanded — register multiple patterns for multi-level coverage.
